@sigil v0 hybrid
P: monolith_now ∧ shared_pg ∧ slice_ready_modules ∧ fast_ship ∧ low_ops -> default_arch
P: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ traffic(modest) -> monolith_now
P: split(post_release) -> prefer(modular_monolith)
R: !team(6) ∧ !ddl("4 months")
G: mod_monolith
V: split(post_release)
A: short_why

[AUDIT]
Plan: ship modular_monolith now and shared PostgreSQL and split-ready modules and fast shipping and low ops then default_arch.
Plan: team(6) and deadline("4 months") and store("PostgreSQL") and traffic(modest) then ship modular_monolith now.
Plan: split(post_release) then prefer(modular_monolith).
Risk: high-risk team(6) and high-risk deadline("4 months").
Goal: modular_monolith.
Verify: split(post_release).
Answer target: short_why.

mod_monolith ∧ team(8) ∧ ddl("6 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ traffic(modest) ∧ fast_ship ∧ low_ops ∧ monolith_now ∧ shared_pg ∧ slice_ready_modules ∧ split(later_if_enterprise) ⇒ prefer(mod_monolith)

Short why: 6 weeks + lean_platform + modest traffic favors one deployable unit on PostgreSQL
